member.name: T:RealEstateStar.DataServices.Activation.AgentContextLoader
member.summary: Loads all activation outputs from IFileStorageProvider to reconstruct an AgentContext. Per-agent files live at real-estate-star/{agentId}/. Per-brokerage files live at real-estate-star/{accountId}/. Returns null if no activation files exist for the agent.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.DataServices.Activation.AgentContextLoader.#ctor(RealEstateStar.Domain.Shared.Interfaces.Storage.IFileStorageProvider,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{RealEstateStar.DataServices.Activation.AgentContextLoader})
member.summary: Loads all activation outputs from IFileStorageProvider to reconstruct an AgentContext. Per-agent files live at real-estate-star/{agentId}/. Per-brokerage files live at real-estate-star/{accountId}/. Returns null if no activation files exist for the agent.

member.name: T:RealEstateStar.DataServices.Cache.MemoryContentCache
member.summary: In-process backed by . Shared across all concurrent pipeline executions on the same host — prevents 100 leads for the same property from each running a CMA or HomeSearch.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.DataServices.Cache.MemoryContentCache.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Caching.Memory.IMemoryCache)
member.summary: In-process backed by . Shared across all concurrent pipeline executions on the same host — prevents 100 leads for the same property from each running a CMA or HomeSearch.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.DataServices.Config.AccountConfigService.AccountHandlePattern
member.remarks:
Pattern:
^[a-z0-9-]+$
Explanation:
○ Match if at the beginning of the string.
○ Match a character in the set [-0-9a-z] atomically at least once.
○ Match if at the end of the string or if before an ending newline.

member.name: T:RealEstateStar.DataServices.Leads.LeadBriefFormatter
member.summary: Formats lead brief content for Drive document storage. Extracted from GwsService — these are lead-domain formatting helpers, not GWS client logic.

member.name: T:RealEstateStar.DataServices.Leads.LeadDeadLetterStore
member.summary: Writes failed lead operations to a local JSON file as a last resort. Survives when Azure Table Storage is unavailable.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.DataServices.Leads.LeadDeadLetterStore.#ctor(System.String,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{RealEstateStar.DataServices.Leads.LeadDeadLetterStore})
member.summary: Writes failed lead operations to a local JSON file as a last resort. Survives when Azure Table Storage is unavailable.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.DataServices.Leads.LeadFileStore.ReadLeadDocAsync(System.String,System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Finds the lead folder for a given leadId and reads its Lead Profile doc. Throws when not found so callers do not silently skip updates.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.DataServices.Leads.LeadMarkdownRenderer.AlreadyFormattedPhone
member.remarks:
Pattern:
^\\(\\d{3}\\) \\d{3}-\\d{4}$
Explanation:
○ Match if at the beginning of the string.
○ Match '('.
○ Match a Unicode digit exactly 3 times.
○ Match the string ") ".
○ Match a Unicode digit exactly 3 times.
○ Match '-'.
○ Match a Unicode digit exactly 4 times.
○ Match if at the end of the string or if before an ending newline.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.DataServices.Leads.LeadMarkdownRenderer.NonDigit
member.remarks:
Pattern:
\\D
Explanation:
○ Match any character other than a Unicode digit.

member.name: T:RealEstateStar.DataServices.Leads.FileLeadStore
member.summary: ILeadStore implementation backed by the local filesystem via LocalStorageProvider. Used in development and CI environments where GDrive is unavailable.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.DataServices.Leads.FileLeadStore.#ctor(RealEstateStar.DataServices.Leads.LocalStorageProvider,System.String)
member.summary: ILeadStore implementation backed by the local filesystem via LocalStorageProvider. Used in development and CI environments where GDrive is unavailable.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.DataServices.Leads.FileLeadStore.GetLeadFolderNames
member.summary: Enumerates lead subfolder names directly from the filesystem. LocalStorageProvider.ListDocumentsAsync only returns files; leads are subdirectories.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.DataServices.Onboarding.ProfileScraperService.JsonLdRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
<script[^>]*type="application/ld\\+json"[^>]*>([\\s\\S]*?)</script>
Options:
RegexOptions.IgnoreCase
Explanation:
○ Match '<'.
○ Match a character in the set [Ss].
○ Match a character in the set [Cc].
○ Match a character in the set [Rr].
○ Match a character in the set [Ii].
○ Match a character in the set [Pp].
○ Match a character in the set [Tt].
○ Match a character other than '>' greedily any number of times.
○ Match a character in the set [Tt].
○ Match a character in the set [Yy].
○ Match a character in the set [Pp].
○ Match a character in the set [Ee].
○ Match the string "=\"".
○ Match a character in the set [Aa].
○ Match a character in the set [Pp] exactly 2 times.
○ Match a character in the set [Ll].
○ Match a character in the set [Ii].
○ Match a character in the set [Cc].
○ Match a character in the set [Aa].
○ Match a character in the set [Tt].
○ Match a character in the set [Ii].
○ Match a character in the set [Oo].
○ Match a character in the set [Nn].
○ Match '/'.
○ Match a character in the set [Ll].
○ Match a character in the set [Dd].
○ Match '+'.
○ Match a character in the set [Jj].
○ Match a character in the set [Ss].
○ Match a character in the set [Oo].
○ Match a character in the set [Nn].
○ Match '"'.
○ Match a character other than '>' atomically any number of times.
○ Match '>'.
○ 1st capture group.
○ Match any character lazily any number of times.
○ Match the string "</".
○ Match a character in the set [Ss].
○ Match a character in the set [Cc].
○ Match a character in the set [Rr].
○ Match a character in the set [Ii].
○ Match a character in the set [Pp].
○ Match a character in the set [Tt].
○ Match '>'.

Options:
RegexOptions.IgnoreCase
Explanation:

○ Match with 2 alternative expressions.
○ Match a sequence of expressions.

○ Match a character other than '>' atomically any number of times.
○ Match '>'.
○ Match any character lazily any number of times.
○ Match the string "</".
○ Match the same text as matched by the 1st capture group.
○ Match '>'.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.DataServices.Onboarding.JsonFileSessionStore.ValidatePathWithinBase(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Defense-in-depth: verifies the resolved file path is within the base directory. The regex on session IDs prevents path traversal, but this check catches any edge cases in path normalization.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.DataServices.Onboarding.JsonFileSessionStore.SessionIdRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
^[a-f0-9]{12}$
Explanation:
○ Match if at the beginning of the string.
○ Match a character in the set [0-9a-f] exactly 12 times.
○ Match if at the end of the string or if before an ending newline.

member.name: T:RealEstateStar.DataServices.Privacy.DriveActivityParser
member.summary: Parses JSON output from `gws drive activity --format json` into DriveActivityEvent list.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.DataServices.Privacy.DriveActivityParser.Parse(System.String)
member.summary: Parses a JSON array from gws CLI output into a list of DriveActivityEvent records. Expected shape per element: { "action": "Move" | "Create" | "Edit" | "Delete" | "Rename", "fileName": "Lead Profile.md", "folderPath": "Real Estate Star/1 - Leads/Jane Doe", "destinationParent": "Real Estate Star/2 - Active Clients/Jane Doe", // Move only "timestamp": "2026-03-19T12:00:00Z" }

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.DataServices.Privacy.DriveChangeMonitor.PollAsync(System.String,System.String,System.DateTime,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Polls Google Drive activity for the given agent since , parses folder Move events, and updates lead statuses accordingly.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.DataServices.Privacy.DriveChangeMonitor.ResolveStatus(System.String)
member.summary: Resolves a LeadStatus from a destination folder path like "Real Estate Star/2 - Active Clients/Jane Doe". Extracts the status folder segment and maps its leading number.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.DataServices.Privacy.DriveChangeMonitor.ExtractLeadName(System.String)
member.summary: Extracts the lead name from a source folder path. E.g. "Real Estate Star/1 - Leads/Jane Doe" → "Jane Doe".

member.name: T:RealEstateStar.DataServices.Privacy.LocalComplianceStorageProvider
member.summary: Compliance storage backed by the local file system. Used in development/testing when a service-account Drive is not configured.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.DataServices.Privacy.LocalComplianceStorageProvider.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Compliance storage backed by the local file system. Used in development/testing when a service-account Drive is not configured.

member.name: T:RealEstateStar.DataServices.Privacy.NullConsentAuditService
member.summary: No-op consent audit service used when Azure Table Storage is not configured.

member.name: T:RealEstateStar.DataServices.Shared.ContentSanitizer
member.summary: Sanitizes untrusted external content before it is injected into LLM prompts. Strips HTML, removes invisible Unicode, redacts sensitive data, and removes prompt-injection patterns.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.DataServices.Shared.ContentSanitizer.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{RealEstateStar.DataServices.Shared.ContentSanitizer})
member.summary: Sanitizes untrusted external content before it is injected into LLM prompts. Strips HTML, removes invisible Unicode, redacts sensitive data, and removes prompt-injection patterns.

RegexOptions.Compiled

○ Match '>'.

member.remarks:

[A-Za-z0-9+/]{100,}={0,2}
Options:
RegexOptions.Compiled
Explanation:
○ Match a character in the set [+/-9A-Za-z] atomically at least 100 times.
○ Match '=' atomically at most 2 times.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.DataServices.Shared.ContentSanitizer.PrivateKeyRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
-----BEGIN\\s+[A-Z\\s]+KEY-----|[0-9a-fA-F]{64,}
Options:
RegexOptions.Compiled
Explanation:
○ Match with 2 alternative expressions, atomically.
○ Match a sequence of expressions.
○ Match an empty string.
○ Match a whitespace character greedily at least once.
○ Match a character in the set [A-Z\s] greedily at least once.
○ Match the string "KEY-----".
○ Match a character in the set [0-9A-Fa-f] atomically at least 64 times.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.DataServices.Shared.ContentSanitizer.SsnRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
\\b\\d{3}[-\\s]?\\d{2}[-\\s]?\\d{4}\\b
Options:
RegexOptions.Compiled
Explanation:
○ Match if at a word boundary.
○ Match a Unicode digit exactly 3 times.
○ Match a character in the set [-\s] greedily, optionally.
○ Match a Unicode digit exactly 2 times.
○ Match a character in the set [-\s] greedily, optionally.
○ Match a Unicode digit exactly 4 times.
○ Match if at a word boundary.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.DataServices.Shared.ContentSanitizer.CreditCardRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
\\b(?:\\d{4}[-\\s]?){3}\\d{4}\\b
Options:
RegexOptions.Compiled
Explanation:
○ Match if at a word boundary.
○ Loop exactly 3 times.
○ Match a Unicode digit exactly 4 times.
○ Match a character in the set [-\s] greedily, optionally.
○ Match a Unicode digit exactly 4 times.
○ Match if at a word boundary.

○ Match a sequence of expressions.
○ Match the string "pk_".
○ Match with 2 alternative expressions.
○ Match a sequence of expressions.
○ Match the string "live_".
○ Match a character in the set [0-9A-Za-z] greedily at least 20 times.
○ Match a sequence of expressions.
○ Match the string "test_".
○ Match a character in the set [0-9A-Za-z] greedily at least 20 times.

○ Match if at a word boundary.

member.name: T:RealEstateStar.DataServices.Shared.YamlFrontmatterParser
member.summary: Parses and mutates simple YAML frontmatter blocks in Markdown files. Intentionally avoids YamlDotNet — the frontmatter format is simple enough to handle with string parsing and adding a dependency is not worth it.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.DataServices.Shared.YamlFrontmatterParser.Parse(System.String)
member.summary: Extracts key-value pairs from YAML frontmatter delimited by --- fences. Returns an empty dictionary when no frontmatter is found.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.DataServices.Shared.YamlFrontmatterParser.UpdateField(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Replaces 's value inside the frontmatter block. If the key does not exist it is appended before the closing ---. The markdown body is never modified.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.DataServices.Shared.YamlFrontmatterParser.TryLocateFences(System.String,System.Int32@,System.Int32@)
member.summary: Locates the two --- fences in . On success, is the index immediately after the newline that follows the opening fence, and is the index of the closing fence line.

member.name: T:RealEstateStar.DataServices.Storage.FanOutStorageProvider
member.summary: Three-tier fan-out storage provider. Document methods (Write/Read/Update/Delete/List/EnsureFolder) fan out to: Agent Drive — IGDriveClient (accountId, agentId) Account Drive — IGDriveClient (accountId, "__account__") Platform Blob — IDocumentStorageProvider (Azure Blob Storage) All document tiers are best-effort: failure at any tier logs a warning but does not fail the overall operation. Sheet methods (Append/Read/Redact) pass through to IGwsService using the platform spreadsheet convention.

member.name: F:RealEstateStar.DataServices.Storage.FanOutStorageProvider._isSingleAgent
member.summary: When true, the Account Drive tier and Agent Drive tier write to the same Google Drive folder. Skips the Account tier to avoid wasted API calls and 409 conflicts.

member.name: T:RealEstateStar.DataServices.Storage.FanOutStorageProviderFactory
member.summary: Creates per-agent FanOutStorageProvider instances that write to the agent's Google Drive. All heavy dependencies (IGDriveClient, IGSheetsClient, etc.) are shared singletons — the factory-created instance only holds lightweight string context (accountId, agentId). Instances are short-lived: created at the start of a persist operation and GC'd when done.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.DataServices.Storage.FanOutStorageProviderFactory.#ctor(System.IServiceProvider)
member.summary: Creates per-agent FanOutStorageProvider instances that write to the agent's Google Drive. All heavy dependencies (IGDriveClient, IGSheetsClient, etc.) are shared singletons — the factory-created instance only holds lightweight string context (accountId, agentId). Instances are short-lived: created at the start of a persist operation and GC'd when done.

member.name: T:RealEstateStar.DataServices.Storage.NullTokenStore
member.summary: Null-object implementation used when Azure Storage is not configured (e.g., local development). Silently discards OAuth token persistence rather than crashing the onboarding flow.

member.name: F:RealEstateStar.DataServices.Storage.StorageServiceCollectionExtensions.PlatformDocumentStoreKey
member.summary: Service key used for the platform-tier document store keyed registration. The Api composition root (Program.cs) registers AzureBlobDocumentStore under this key when AzureStorage:ConnectionString is configured; this extension resolves it at runtime. Using a keyed service avoids a compile-time dependency on Clients.Azure from DataServices.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.DataServices.Storage.StorageServiceCollectionExtensions.AddStorageProviders(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration,Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.IHostEnvironment)
member.summary:
Registers the FanOutStorageProvider as IFileStorageProvider and forwards the narrower IDocumentStorageProvider and ISheetStorageProvider interfaces to it.
Platform-tier document storage is resolved via a keyed IDocumentStorageProvider with key . Register AzureBlobDocumentStore (from Clients.Azure) under that key in Program.cs before calling this method. When the keyed service is absent, falls back to LocalStorageProvider using Storage:BasePath config or the host content root.

member.name: T:RealEstateStar.DataServices.WhatsApp.ConversationLogRenderer
member.summary: Pure static utility for rendering WhatsApp conversations as human-readable markdown. Used by ConversationLogger to format messages for storage in Google Drive.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.DataServices.WhatsApp.ConversationLogRenderer.RenderHeader(System.String,System.DateTime,System.Int32)
member.summary: Renders the markdown header for a WhatsApp conversation log.
member.param: The lead's display name
When the conversation was submitted
Lead quality score (0-100)
member.returns: Formatted markdown header

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.DataServices.WhatsApp.ConversationLogRenderer.RenderMessage(System.DateTime,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Renders a single WhatsApp message with timestamp, sender, and blockquoted body.
member.param: When the message was sent
Who sent the message
Message content (may contain newlines)
Optional template name (e.g., "new_lead_notification")
member.returns: Formatted markdown message

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.DataServices.WhatsApp.ConversationLogRenderer.RenderDateHeader(System.DateTime)
member.summary: Renders a date separator header.
member.param: The date to format
member.returns: Formatted markdown date header

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.DataServices.WhatsApp.ConversationLogRenderer.QuoteLines(System.String)
member.summary: Prefixes each line of text with "> " for markdown blockquote.
